create-event

(/moleculizer-input/events/create-event)

Use a create-event to create new molecules during the simulation. You have to specify a particular species, which must therefore be an explicit-species. When you define an explicit species, you have an opportunity to say what its initial population is in the definition of the species, so that it is not necessary to create the initial population with a create-event (although you can do so if you wish.)

AttributesChildren
  • time
  • species-ref
  • population
